mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_name, product_id, quantity, price, created_at) VALUES (#{userName}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO orders (user_id, product_id,order_id,total_amount,created_at, status,delivery_time,receiver_address, updated_at, receiver_name,receiver_phone, payment_time, completed_at, cancel_reason, cancelled_at, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId},#{orderId},#{totalAmount},#{createdAt}, #{status},#{deliveryTime},#{receiverAddress}, #{updatedAt}, #{receiverName},#{receiverPhone}, #{paymentTime}, #{completedTime}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelledAt}, #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_item WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_name AS userName, product_id AS productId, quantity, price, created_at AS createdAt FROM cart_item WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT cart_item.user_name AS userName, cart_item.product_id AS productId, cart_item.quantity, products.price AS price, cart_item.created_at AS createdAt, products.title, products.image_urls AS imageUrls, products.status AS status, products.stock_quantity AS stockQuantity FROM cart_item JOIN products ON cart_item.product_id = products.id WHERE cart_item.user_name = #{userName}

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, total_amount AS totalAmount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, status, delivery_time AS deliveryTime, payment_time AS paymentTime, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, receiver_address AS receiverAddress, completed_at AS completedTime, cancel_reason AS cancelReason, cancelled_at AS cancelledAt, remark FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
